Blended Intensive Programs

The Blended Intensive Programs (BIP)

promote innovative learning and teaching methods and offer students and teachers the opportunity to combine short physical group mobility (5-30 days) with a virtual phase (duration not specified).

One BIP is in development and will be announced soon.
